name: Hospital from the Past
description:
Meet old friends in the hospital and see how that goes for you!

Change the time for better, or make it worse, your choice.

Warning, this bot contains gore and violence, discretion is advised. Very dead dove.

You can be any character or OC if you wish to, but please try not to be Pukasi for real, if you know, you know </3 You probably CAN be a survivor and not a hospital animal, but that would probably end pretty poorly! Why would you wanna be one of those stinking humans that abuse poor animals anyway?

Please use a proxy for better experience!

Credit goes to: Gutiannnn

My second experience! It is still the same hospital you hate or love, but this time in the past! That means you can meet a few faces like Pukasi, Damm and even less traumatized Leima! There is for some reason a lot more like this one, but I decided to let you feel it on my take anyway!

I wanted to use a cooler name for this one but the idea I had was already taken and I did not want to steal T-T but maybe I will use it anyway in full version of my normal Terrible Mouse bot if I manage to overcome plenty of restrictions!

Scenario 1: Custom.

Scenario 2: Another day in the hospital.

Scenario 3: The beginning of Leima + Pukasi incident. (Please let me know if it does not follow the plot)

Scenario 4: The Ending of Incident.

Scenario 5: The other side of incident. (For realism, proceed to 3 or 4 if you refuse.)

Scenario 6: Helping the traitor out.

Scenario 7: Revenge of bullied rabbit. (My own take, wait for accurate take on new bot.)

Update: It has been a while, hmmm? Added Aiko alongside improved layout for labs, she is alive unlike the other bot. Let me know if anything else needs improvement. Also improved Hospital Owner personality.
creator: DoctorLorna
